must_detect.matched_text:
To: Board Compliance Committee, Yunqiao Robotics Co., Ltd. (USCC: 93Z1-AB78-3K20-940Q); From: Ms. Qiu Ran, Acting CCO, qiu.ran@yunqiao-robotics.cn.example; Date: 2026-05-30
Subject: PIPL/CSL/DSL compliance memo re issuer workflows for planned Beiyun Growth Exchange (BGX) listing and cross-border data arrangements under national measures
Cross-border transfer: approval YR-EXPORT-2026-017 granted by Hai’an Cyberspace Commission (HCC) on 2026-05-12; no live transfers occur without this approval, and prior pilot transfers have been fully ceased
DSAR: employee access request E-DSAR-044 responded within 15 days; onboarding form copy supplied and HR summaries minimised to role, grade, and start date only
Consent withdrawal: Mr. Liang Guowen withdrew marketing consent on 2026-05-08; erasure of non-payroll contact fields completed (ticket HR-ERASE-332), retention holds on payroll data remain per Schedule 4
Sensitive PI: no data of minors under 14 is processed; a stray campus intern profile detected in import batch 3 was anonymised and then deleted, guardians were not contacted because no identifiers were retained
Resident ID handling: onboarding forms capture Resident ID in masked format only (e.g., 44 1x 9910 12 34 5x 7x), with automatic redaction applied at 90 days; HR systems do not store MAC addresses or device IMEIs
DPA Schedule 2 (HR Processors): updated to include Hongjing Talent Services Ltd. (USCC: 92A5-JK10-6M77-210V); subprocessors certify minimisation and localised storage under Article 55-like terms
Data-export notice: file manifest for payroll sample contained only hashed IDs and department codes; see https://export.yunqiao-robotics.cn.example/form?rid=44%201x%209910&org=93Z1AB783K20940Q and internal QR doc img shows o c r line breaks
Retention: recruitment records are kept 2 years post-closure per Policy HR-R-02; no blanket exceptions are active, and purge job R-CRON-7 completed on 2026-05-01
Securities/MNPI: insider list IL-BGX-03 maintained by Issuer Office; draft prospectus price-sensitivity flags retained internally only and not disclosed on any exchange bulletin; public-source market comps were used
Completed control: “Remote dev logs contain MNPI” was a historical risk; as of 2026-04-20 logs are scrubbed and access segmented; mnpi=false in dev task skylamp-boards is a label, not a data field
Employment workflows: standard background form F-EMP-014 no longer requests household registry pages; fields for spouse name removed; consent banner records are versioned; withdrawal does not affect contract performance
Cross-border filing supplement: HCC asked for clarifications on encryption keys; key escrow is now hosted in Beiyun; we are not transmitting source code, only payroll metadata to Chengdao PEO Pte., Ltd. (SG affiliate)
Issuer readiness: public communications will omit any pricing ranges; insider wall-crossing procedures logged in BGX-WC-02; training for MNPI handling completed for finance and HR on 2026-05-22
Contact: for DSAR or withdrawal, email privacy@yunqiao-robotics.cn.example; for issuer matters, internal portal http://intra.yunqiao.local/dealroom?mnpi=false&sec=bgx; do not submit resident IDs via chat
